articles.title: Final Trade: BA, C, NKE, SLB
articles.summary: CNBC's Melissa Lee and the 'Fast Money' traders presented their final trades of the day, focusing on the stocks BA (Boeing), C (Citigroup), NKE (Nike), and SLB (Schlumberger). The segment provides a quick roundup of expert opinions on these specific companies as the trading day concludes.
